rationale: The confirmed US-Iran peace deal announcement causes oil prices to fall (energy cost relief for Poland), while Russian strikes killing civilians in Kyiv represent a qualitative escalation in the ongoing war near Poland's border.

top_events.title: Oil prices fall and shares jump after US-Iran deal announced
top_events.summary: A confirmed US-Iran peace deal announcement is driving oil prices down, which could meaningfully reduce energy costs for Polish households and businesses in the near term.

top_events.title: Russian strikes kill nine and set historic cathedral in Kyiv ablaze
top_events.summary: Russia's confirmed deadly strikes on Kyiv, including destruction of a historic cathedral, represent a qualitative escalation in the war directly on Poland's eastern border — raising security anxiety for Polish residents.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A major UK-Japan investment deal signals continued Western economic cooperation; indirect positive signal for EU trade environment but no direct impact on Polish daily life.
